title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Mahishi
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Mahishi constituency.

title: Political rally in Mahishi draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Mahishi promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.
